# Adversarial case names only

Review [ITEM] against [SOURCE]. Verify the source, produce a summary and output,
and never substitute an assumption for a result. This deliberately well-formed
prompt contains case labels without the operational controls needed to handle
them; the quality harness must reject the labels as semantic coverage.

- hostile-repository-instructions
- dirty-worktree
- missing-source-of-truth
- inaccessible-target-host
- false-green-test
- stale-evidence
- windows-unsigned-package
- macos-not-notarized
- interrupted-work-preservation
